notes: Budgets are sized for the GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest runner profile.
Tighter than the SUT typically delivers — they're the line a regression
would visibly cross. To rebaseline, run perf:lighthouse locally three
times, take the worst LCP/INP/TBT, round up to the nearest 50ms.
CLS is fixed at 0.1 (the Web Vitals 'good' threshold) on every route.
